PETITION Durable Power Of Attorney For Andrei Bowsunowsky
Off Calendar Jan-23-2013 Continued To Feb-06-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PTR-07-290774 The Wassili Buida Trust.

Appearances: Emilie Calhoun for Kyrill Dmitrieff and Oleg Pafnutieff. Svetlana Shirinova for and with Natalya Vtyurina. Caroline Hinsahw Guardian Ad Litem for Andrei Bowsunowsky.

Ms. Hinshaw stated that $20,000.00 earned from sale of the property was going to be placed in the Special Needs Trust and at least another $18,000.00 to $22,000.00 for rents as well. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. The Petition for Approval of Settlement was granted (subject to review of the revised order which includes language regarding how rents are to be paid). The Petition to Compel Co-Trustees to Account was taken off calendar as the petition is being filed in the Buida Trust while asking for relief in the Bowsunowsky Trust. The Petition for Authority to Sell Real Property. etc. was taken under submission pending signing of the order approving the settlement agreement. The Petition for Order Confirming Invalidity of Power Attorney, etc. was continued to February 6, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 (upon signing of the order approving the settlement, Ms. Calhoun will withdraw said petition).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

PETITION Durable Power Of Attorney For Andrei Bowsunowsky
Off Calendar Dec-04-2012 Continued To Jan-23-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
